title: The Adventure Begins
overview: A young warrior sets out to rid his homeland of its evil conqueror. In the opener, Lief and his guardian, Barda, embark on their quest to locate the seven gems necessary to free Deltora from the Shadow Lord.

title: Jasmine, Girl of the Forests
overview: Danger surrounds Lief and Barda in the Forests of Silence as they meet a mysterious girl while searching for hidden gems.

title: The Golden Knight
overview: Jasmine leads Lief and Barda to a giant knight in the forest who believes they have come to rob him.

title: The Enigmatic Giant
overview: Lief heads for the Lake of Tears, but he must first journey though Thaegan's land and solve riddles posed by her guard.

title: Nij and Doj's Trap
overview: Lief and his friends are chased by Grey Guards because they rescued a Ralad man.

title: The Monster in the Lake of Tears
overview: Manus guides Lief to the Lake of Tears by way of his homeland, where they learn a surprising truth.

title: Sorceress Thaegan
overview: Lief tries to take the gem from Soldeen, a giant monster, but is interrupted by Thaegen, an evil sorceress.

title: Tom's Curious Shop
overview: Lief and his friends move on toward the next destination after defeating the Thaegan Sorceress, but Lief realizes they are being followed when the belt signals danger and Jasmine gets a bad feeling.

title: Noradz the Clean
overview: Lief and his friends are stuck in Noradz, whose residents clean obsessively and whose ruler wants Lief and his friends to stay.

title: Escape
overview: Lief and his friends must fight their way out of Noradz after escaping from a dungeon, in which they'd been imprisoned.

title: Cross the River
overview: Lief and his friends escape from Noradz hidden in a food wagon that takes them to Tom's store, where they learn that the Shadow Lord rules over Noradz.

title: The King of the Rats
overview: The group searches for the third gem in the City of Rats and encounters Reeah, a giant snake that guards the city's towers.

title: Endon and Jarred
overview: Lief and his friends evacuate from the City of Rats. While resting by the Broad River, Lief shares the story of his father and King Endon with Jasmine.

title: The Stolen Gems
overview: Lief tells the story of his father, Jarred; King Endon; and Queen Sharn, who have all vowed to one day recover the belt's stolen gems.

title: Good Luck! Bad Luck!
overview: A festival in Rithmere draws the attention of Lief and his friends, who try to win 100 gold coins by participating in its Games.

title: The Rithmere Games
overview: Lief and his friends are in danger of missing the games when they are locked in their rooms at the inn and threatened by a stranger.

title: Test of Endurance
overview: Lief and his friends get advice before they compete in the final round of the games.

title: Jasmine vs. Doom
overview: Jasmine is forced to compete in the last round of the games after discovering that some of her opponents have been poisoned.

title: The Boy From the Resistance
overview: The Grey Guards attack Lief and his friends as they journey to the Shifting Sands, but help comes from an unexpected source.

title: The Shifting Sands
overview: The Grey Guards continue their pursuit as Lief and the others search for the fourth gem in the Shifting Sands, where they meet Terreocti, the Sand Beast.

title: The Heavenly Stone
overview: Lief loses consciousness after a swarm of bees attacks him, and he receives advice about his quest from his parents while he dreams.

title: Thaegan's Return
overview: The sorceress Thaegan is revived by the Shadow Lord and vows revenge against Lief, who continues on his journey. Meanwhile, Jasmine has doubts about Francoise.

title: Thaegan's Trap
overview: Lief and his friends find Francoise's mother in the palace, but they end up trapped after Thaegan tricks them.

title: Meeting Prin
overview: Lief has a nightmare that reveals a door bearing the Shadow Lord's mark after he and his friends drink from the Dreaming Spring on their way to Dread Mountain.

title: Kin to the Air
overview: Lief's resolve is renewed after he dreams about his parents.

title: Vraal Attack!
overview: Lief and his friends avoid gnomes and arrive at Dread Mountain, where they encounter the Grey Guards and a powerful monster.

title: Trapped Under Dread Mountain
overview: Prin helps Lief's group defeat Vraal and leads them through the Boolong Forest, where the gnomes seal them in a cave.

title: The Great Gellick!
overview: The trapped group learn they are being observed in the cave, and they devise a plan to trick their captors, escape and find the fifth gem.

title: The End of the Carn Squad?
overview: The group leave Dread Mountain with the fifth gem but are caught in thick fog as the Grey Guards pursue them.

title: The Mysterious Ols
overview: Dain saves Lief's life when the group is attacked on the way to the Maze of the Beast.

title: Goodbye, Jasmine
overview: Lief and his friends are detained at the Resistance hideout until they're cleared of being the Shadow Lord's Ols. Meanwhile, Jasmine decides to leave the group and travel on her own.

title: The River Queen
overview: Jasmine leaves a secret code for Lief, which he finds when his group enters a town ransacked by Bandits. Meanwhile, their new companion Dain reveals more about himself as they travel to the Tol River.

title: Pirate Attack
overview: Jasmine rejoins the group on a river boat teeming with pirates and Ols. After the battle, Lief realizes that some of his friends and his belt are missing.

title: The Pirates' Feast
overview: Pirates capture Dain and steal the Belt of Deltora; the group locate a map that leads them through the Maze of the Beast and to the pirates.

title: Maze of the Beast
overview: Pirates lock the group in the Maze of the Beast, where a frightening monster lives, but they cannot try to escape until they find the sixth gem.

title: Sorceress Thaegan Is Back!
overview: Dain disappears while Lief and the others escape the Maze of the Beast with the sixth gem. While traveling through the forest, the group is watched by an unknown person.

title: Mirror of Fear
overview: Lief's friends are captured by Thaegan, and Lief must consider putting his quest on hold in order to save them.

title: Sorcerer Oacus
overview: The group lose a member of their party while traveling to the Valley of the Lost. Harassed by the Shadow Lord's minions, they take another route.

title: The Vow of the Torans
overview: The group is swept along the River Tor to the City of Tora, where Dain's footsteps lead them through the city walls even though the Grey Guards are following them.

title: The Valley of the Lost
overview: In the Valley of the Lost, Lief must play a game to win the seventh gem. While playing, he learns shocking news.

title: The Last Gem
overview: The identity of the seventh gem's guardian stuns the group, who enter a tough battle to protect the belt and obtain the gem.

title: The Seven Gems United
overview: The group must locate the royal heir after finding the last of the seven gems.

title: Nevets Goes Wild
overview: Danger awaits the group as they head for the gathering place where the seven tribes must meet to restore the Belt of Deltora's power.

title: Battle at Withick Mire
overview: Lief uses the Dreaming Spring to investigate a traitorous transfer of information from the gathering to the Shadow Lord.

title: The Oath
overview: A spy remains undetected among the united seven tribes. Lief is concerned but focuses on the pledging ceremony in hopes that the royal heir will be found.

title: The Last Battle of Fire
overview: Lief and the others plan to sneak into the Palace of Del to rescue Dain, who has been kidnapped, but they are attacked by an enemy believed beaten in the Valley of the Lost.

title: The Seven Tribes
overview: Lief's group encounters others in need in the Palace while rescuing Dain, but helping them could turn their mission into a trap.

title: Who is Dain?
overview: As an army of Ols attack, Lief and the others finally find out who's been leaking information about them to the Shadow Lord.

title: The Fight for Freedom
overview: Jasmine makes a personal discovery as Lief comes to her rescue at the castle while being pursued by the Grey Guards.

title: Who's the Next King?
overview: Lief must make a choice that may have severe consequences; a battle erupts after the citizens and the Resistance enter the unrest.

title: Battle of the Ak-Babas
overview: The forces of evil try to keep Lief from completing his quest and saving his kingdom.

title: When the Seven Gems Shine
overview: Lief must battle the Shadow Lord to finish his quest, after attaining the last piece of the puzzle.

title: The Pirates of the River Tor
